import{useEffect}from'react';// Attach to any component to trigger .reveal animations on scroll
export default function useScrollReveal(){useEffect(()=>{const elements=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-scale');const observer=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(entry=>{if(entry.isIntersecting){entry.target.classList.add('visible');}});},{threshold:0.12,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});elements.forEach(el=>observer.observe(el));return()=>observer.disconnect();});}
